title: Gas System
body:
Ultimate Flatulence Feature™  Because Your Game Deserves More Than Silence

Why settle for silence when you can add the subtle art of digital flatulence? This mod doesn’t just add a fart — it adds presence.

- Instantly boosts your character’s authenticity.
  
- Improves game world atmosphere with unparalleled naturalism.
  
- Serves as a confidence booster for your in-game avatar.
  
- Scientifically proven* to enhance player satisfaction (not really).
  
- Creates memorable moments — because everyone remembers a good fart.
  
- It’s not about what it does, it’s about how it makes you feel.
  
- Upgrade your game today. Because silence is overrated.
